landing.heroDescription: Dala izithombe zemfundo ezinhle, izethulo, imisebenzi, amaphepha okusebenza nama-storyboards evidiyo ngomzuzwana. Vumela i-AI yenze umsebenzi onzima ukuze ugxile entweni ebaluleke kakhulu - abafundi bakho.
landing.featuresTitle: Konke Okudingayo Ukuze Udale Okuqukethwe Okumangalisayo
landing.demoSubtitle: Buka ukuthi othisha badala kanjani okuqukethwe kwemfundo okumangalisayo ngomzuzwana ongu-60 kuphela
landing.demoPlaySubtext: Bona ukuthi kulula kanjani ukudala izinto zesifundo
landing.sampleSubtitle: Izibonelo zangempela ezidaliwe othisha besebenzisa i-BrightBoard
landing.testimonialSubtitle: Hlanganyela nezinkulungwane zothisha abadala izifundo ezingcono nge-AI
landing.ctaSubtitle: Hlanganyela nothisha emhlabeni wonke abonga amahora njalo ngeviki ngokudala okuqukethwe okuqhutshwa yi-AI. Qala mahhala namhlanje - akudingeki ikhadi lesikweletu.
landing.faq1Answer: Chaza nje lokho ofuna ukukudala, bese i-AI yethu idala okuqukethwe kwemfundo okwazi ngomzuzwana. Ungadala izithombe, izethulo, amaphepha okusebenza, imidlalo exhumana nabantu, ama-storyboards evidiyo, nokuqukethwe kombhalo kunoma yisiphi isifundo nanoma yiliphi izinga lebanga.
landing.faq2Answer: Yebo! Izinga lethu lamahhala likunika ukudala okuqukethwe okungu-5 ngosuku. Lokhu kufanelekile ukuzama ipulatifomu nokudala izinto ezibalulekile zezifundo zakho.
landing.faq3Answer: I-BrightBoard isekela izinhlobo eziyi-6 zokuqukethwe: izithombe zemfundo, izethulo eziphelele namanothi omkhulumi, amaphepha okusebenza angaprintwa, imidlalo exhumana nabantu (njenge-Lucky Spinner ne-Memory Match), ama-storyboards evidiyo nokulandisa kwe-AI, nokuqukethwe kombhalo njengezindaba nezincazelo.
landing.faq4Answer: Ngempela! Konke okuqukethwe okudala kungokwakho ukusetshenziswa ekilasini lakho, ukwabelana nabafundi, ukuphrinta, noma ukufaka ezintweni zakho zokufundisa. Abasebenzisi be-Premium bathola okuqukethwe okungenayo uphawu lwamanzi.
landing.faq5Answer: I-BrightBoard isekela izilimi eziyi-11 okuhlanganisa isingisi, isiFulentshi, isiSpanishi, isiPutukezi, isi-Arabhu, isiHindi, isiSwahili, isiZulu, isiShayina saseMandarin, isiVietnam, nesiLuganda. Ungadala okuqukethwe usebenzise i-interface nganoma yiluphi lolu limi.
landing.faq6Answer: Imidlalo yethu njenge-Lucky Spinner, Memory Match, ne-Quiz Show ingadlalwa ngokugcwele ku-inthanethi. Dala umdlalo nje, bese uwudlala ngqo kusiphequluli sakho noma wabelane ngelinki nabafundi bakho ukuze bafunde bekude.
landing.slideImageDesc: Dala imidwebo emihle, efanele izingane nganoma yisiphi isihloko ngomzuzwana
landing.slidePresentationDesc: Amasethi amaslayidi aphelele anezithombe namanothi omkhulumi, alungele ukufundisa
landing.slideWorksheetDesc: Gcwalisa izikhala, ukukhetha okuningi, nama-prompts okubhala ngokhiye bempendulo
landing.slideGameDesc: Lucky Spinner, Memory Match, Quiz Show nokunye - kudlaleka ku-inthanethi
landing.slideVideoDesc: Iziqondiso zokubona ufreyimu ngofreyimu nokulandisa kwe-AI nomculo wasemva
landing.slideTextDesc: Izindaba, izincazelo, nezinsizakufunda zanoma yiliphi izinga lebanga
landing.testimonial1Quote: I-BrightBoard iguqule ukuhlela kwami izifundo. Okwakuthatha amahora manje sekuthatha imizuzu. Abafundi bami bathanda izethulo ezinemibala!
landing.testimonial2Quote: Isici semidlalo exhumana nabantu simangaliso. Abafundi bami bajabulisa kakhulu kunakuqala. I-Lucky Spinner isiyintandokazi yekilasi!
landing.testimonial3Quote: Njengomfundisi wezilimi, ngiyathanda ukuthi i-BrightBoard isekela izilimi eziningi. Ukudala amaphepha okusebenza ngezilimi ezimbili manje kulula kakhulu!
landing.testimonial4Quote: Ama-storyboard evidiyo nokulandisa kwe-AI angisize ukudala okuqukethwe kwemfundo abafundi bami abangakubuka ekhaya. Ithuluzi elimangalisayo!

contentTypes.imageDesc: Dala imidwebo emihle, elungele ikilasi eyenza imiqondo iphile
contentTypes.presentationDesc: Dala amasethi amaslayidi aphelele anemifanekiso namanothi omkhulumi ngemizuzu
contentTypes.textDesc: Dala izindaba, izincazelo nezinsizakufunda ezilungiselwe nanoma yiliphi izinga lebanga
contentTypes.activityDesc: Klama imibuzo exhumana nabantu, imidlalo yokuhambisana nemisebenzi yekilasi ekhangayo
contentTypes.storyboardDesc: Hlela amavidiyo emfundo anokunyakaza ngeziqondiso zokubona ufreyimu ngofreyimu
contentTypes.worksheetDesc: Dala amaphepha okusebenza angaprintwa anemibuzo, ukugcwalisa izikhala nokunye
contentTypes.mindmapDesc: Yenza amabalazwe ezingqondo ukuze uhlole izihloko, ucabange futhi ulungiselele imiqondo
contentTypes.mindmapColorHint: Chofoza isigqi segatsha ukushintsha umbala walo.
contentTypes.mindmapPremiumHint: Imibala yamagatsha, ukwengeza amagatsha nokukhipha i-PDF kudinga
contentTypes.mindmapBranchAddedDesc: Chofoza inhloko yegatsha elisha ukuphinda kuliqanjwe.
contentTypes.mindmapPremiumDesc: Khuphuka kuya ku-Premium ukuvula ukulungisa amagatsha, ukwenza imibala nokukhipha i-PDF.
contentTypes.mindmapPremiumNote: Ukulungisa amagatsha, ukwenza imibala nokukhipha i-PDF zizici ze-Premium.

auth.loginSubtitle: Ngena ngemvume ukuze uqhubeke udala okuqukethwe okumangalisayo

home.chooseType: Khetha uhlobo lokuqukethwe bese uchaza okudingayo. I-AI izokukudalela ngomzuzwana.
home.subject: Isifundo
home.startCreating: Qala ngokukhetha uhlobo lokuqukethwe nokufaka incazelo ngaphezulu.
home.referencePhotoHint: Ukukhetha: Layisha isithombe sesifundo sakho njengesibonelo
home.referencePhotoAnalysis: I-AI izohlahlela lesi sithombe futhi idale ukwethulwa okusekelwe emqondweni nasesitayeleni saso.
home.recording: Kuyarekhoda... Cindezela inkinobho yokumisa noma ukhulume ukuze wengeze encazelweni yakho
home.worksheetColorHint: Khetha umbala ukuze ubuke esikrinini noma okumnyama nomhlophe ukuze uprinte
home.placeholderImage: Chaza isithombe sezemfundo ofuna ukusidala... isb: 'Umfanekiso onombala omuhle wemijikelezo yamanzi'
home.placeholderPresentation: Chaza isihloko sokwethulwa kwakho... isb: 'Ukwethulwa okumayelana namadinosaur ibanga lesi-2'
home.placeholderText: Chaza okuqukethwe kwezemfundo okudingayo... isb: 'Indaba emfushane ngobungane ye-pre-K'
home.placeholderActivity: Chaza isihloko somdlalo... isb: 'Umdlalo ojabulisayo wezinombolo zokuphindaphinda ibanga lesi-3'
home.placeholderStoryboard: Chaza umqondo wakho wevidiyo ye-animation... isb: 'Ividiyo ye-animation efundisa ingoma ye-ABC'
home.placeholderWorksheet: Chaza ishidi lomsebenzi... isb: 'Ishidi lezibalo lokuhlanganisa ibanga lesi-2'
home.placeholderMindmap: Chaza isihloko semephu yengqondo... isb: 'Imisebenzi nezindawo emphakathini'

about.title: Mayelana ne-BrightBoard
about.subtitle: Ukunikeza othisha emhlabeni wonke amandla ngokudala okuqukethwe okuqhutshwa yi-AI
about.missionText: I-BrightBoard ikhona ukunika wonke uthisha ukufinyelela amathuluzi okudala okuqukethwe kwemfundo ekhwalithini yochwepheshe. Sikholwa ukuthi lapho othisha benga isikhathi ekulungiseleleni okuqukethwe, bangafaka amandla engeziwe kulokho okubaluleke ngempela: ukukhuthaza nokuxhuma abafundi babo.
about.storyText1: I-BrightBoard yazalwa ngokubheka okulula: othisha bachitha amahora amaningi bedala izinto zemfundo, ngokuvamile besebenza ebusuku nasekupheleni kwesonto ukulungiselela okuqukethwe kwamakilasi abo. Besazi ukuthi i-AI ingakushintsha lokho.
about.storyText2: Yasungulwa e-Uganda, i-BrightBoard yakhiwe ngombono womhlaba wonke. Ipulatifomu yethu isekela izilimi eziyi-11 futhi yakhelwe ukukhonza abafundisi e-Afrika, e-Asia, e-Yurophu nangalé. Siyaqonda izinselele ezihlukile othisha ababhekana nazo ezindaweni zemfundo ezahlukahlukene.
about.founderBio: Kayondo Abass ungumsunguli nomdali oyedwa we-BrightBoard. Eqhutshwa uthando lwemfundo nobuchwepheshe, wakha i-BrightBoard ukuvala igebe phakathi kwamakhono e-AI nezidingo zekilasi. Ehlala e-Uganda, u-Kayondo uletha umbono ohlukile ngezinselele othisha ababhekana nazo emhlabeni wonke, ikakhulukazi emazweni asathuthuka lapho izinsiza zinomkhawulo kodwa umfutho awunamkhawulo.
about.offerImagesDesc: Dala imidwebo, izinhlelo kanye nezinsizakubona ezenzelwe noma yisiphi isifundo neqembu leminyaka.
about.offerPresentationsDesc: Dala amasethi amaslayidi aphelele namanothi omkhulumi, ama-animation, nokukhishwa kwe-PowerPoint ngemizuzu.
about.offerGamesDesc: Yakha izinhlobo eziyi-12+ zemidlalo edlalekayo ku-inthanethi okuhlanganisa ama-spinner, ukuqhathanisa kwenkumbulo, ibhokisi lemfihlo nokunye.
about.offerWorksheetsDesc: Dala amaphepha okusebenza angaprintwa anezinhlobo ezahlukahlukene zemibuzo namafomethi alandwayo.
about.offerVideosDesc: Dala ama-storyboard evidiyo enyakazayo nokulandisa kwe-AI, izihlokwana kanye nomculo wasemva.
about.offerTextDesc: Dala izindaba, izincazelo, izinhlelo zezifundo nezinye izinto zemfundo ezibhaliwe.
about.globalText: I-BrightBoard isekela izilimi eziyi-11 okuhlanganisa isingisi, isiFulentshi, isiSpanishi, isiPutukezi, isi-Arabhu, isiHindi, isiShayina, isiVietnam, isiSwahili, isiLuganda, nesiZulu. Ipulatifomu yethu inokwesekwa kwesandla sokudla ukuya kwesobunxele kwe-Arabhu futhi yakhelwe ukusebenza ngokunemba kuwo wonke amadivaysi.
about.value1Desc: Yonke into esiyakhayo yakhelwe othisha nabafundi engqondweni. Okuqukethwe kufanelekile ngeminyaka, kuhambisana nezifundo futhi kulungele ikilasi.
about.value2Desc: Sikholwa ukuthi amathuluzi emfundo asekhwalithini kufanele atholakale kuwo wonke uthisha, kungakhathaliseki indawo yakhe noma isabelomali. Izinga lethu lamahhala liqinisekisa ukuthi akukho uthisha oshiywa ngasemuva.
about.value3Desc: Sisebenzisa ubuchwepheshe be-AI obusha kunakho konke hhayi ngenxa yabo uqobo, kodwa ukuxazulula izinkinga zangempela othisha ababhekana nazo nsuku zonke.
about.ctaText: Hlanganyela nezinkulungwane zothisha asebevele besebenzisa i-BrightBoard ukudala okuqukethwe kwemfundo okumangalisayo.

contact.title: Xhumana Nathi
contact.subtitle: Unombuzo, isiphakamiso, noma udinga usizo? Singathanda ukuzwa kuwe.
contact.successDesc: Siyabonga ngokuxhumana nathi. Sizophendula phakathi kwamahora angu-24-48.
contact.errorDesc: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle. Sicela usithumele i-imeyili ngqo ku-support@brightboardapp.com.
contact.thankYouText: Siyabonga ngokuxhumana nathi. Ithimba lethu lizobukeza umlayezo wakho bese liphendula phakathi kwamahora angu-24-48.
contact.responseText: Ngokuvamile siphendula phakathi kwamahora angu-24-48 ngezinsuku zomsebenzi.

footer.description: Ipulatifomu yokudala okuqukethwe eqhutshwa yi-AI yothisha abamatasatasa. Dala izithombe zemfundo, izethulo, imisebenzi, amaphepha okusebenza nama-storyboards evidiyo ngomzuzwana.
